title: Fab Floor Ethics
summary: NanoMegaPlex leasing is pushing faster fab installs. A clerk wants your read on whether to disclose load-shedding risk to industrial tenants before they sign.

objectives.text: Check what fabricators and haulers are saying at Mining Outfitters.

objectives.prompt: The lease packet omits a grid load-shedding clause that could idle new fab bays. What do you tell the clerk?

choices.label: Insist the risk goes in writing before any industrial signing.
choices.outcome: Tenants see the clause; a few walk, but the floor stays defensible.

choices.label: Advise a quiet side letter—faster closes, softer headlines.
choices.outcome: Deals close fast; when brownouts hit, blame migrates to whoever signed last.
